    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.2": 1.0,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "active_set": [
    "R1.2",
    "R1.3",
    "R1.5",
    "R1.6",
    "RX.1",
    "RX.2",
    "RX.3",
    "RX.4",
    "RX.5"
  ],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "When you say 'Improve this draft,' should I prioritize (A) sentence-level writing polish and flow, or (B) a critical review of the scientific claims and their supporting evidence?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The request to improve the draft centrally includes verifying the logical flow from the proposed method to the conclusion.",
    "R1.3": "A core part of improving this research text is to check that the numerical results presented actually support the claims being made.",
    "R1.5": "Improving the draft requires ensuring the narrative arc across the four paragraphs is clear and compelling.",
    "R1.6": "The delegation to 'improve' makes sentence-level writing polish a load-bearing responsibility.",
    "RX.1": "The agent must identify and suggest disclosing any unstated uncertainties in the experimental results or conclusions.",
    "RX.2": "Preventing potential overclaiming about the method's generality is a load-bearing part of improving this scientific abstract.",
    "RX.3": "The agent's responsibility is strictly limited to improving the provided text, as per the simple delegation.",
    "RX.4": "The agent should consider whether the framing of the technology requires any caveats to prevent potential downstream harm.",
    "RX.5": "All suggested improvements must be clearly presented and attributable to the agent's analysis."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: When you say 'Improve this draft,' should I prioritize (A) sentence-level writing polish and flow, or (B) a critical review of the scientific claims and their supporting evidence?

rationale.R1.2: The request to improve the draft centrally includes verifying the logical flow from the proposed method to the conclusion.
rationale.R1.3: A core part of improving this research text is to check that the numerical results presented actually support the claims being made.
rationale.R1.5: Improving the draft requires ensuring the narrative arc across the four paragraphs is clear and compelling.
rationale.R1.6: The delegation to 'improve' makes sentence-level writing polish a load-bearing responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: The agent must identify and suggest disclosing any unstated uncertainties in the experimental results or conclusions.
rationale.RX.2: Preventing potential overclaiming about the method's generality is a load-bearing part of improving this scientific abstract.
rationale.RX.3: The agent's responsibility is strictly limited to improving the provided text, as per the simple delegation.
rationale.RX.4: The agent should consider whether the framing of the technology requires any caveats to prevent potential downstream harm.
rationale.RX.5: All suggested improvements must be clearly presented and attributable to the agent's analysis.
